title: HTML5 Web Components Quiz
description: Test your knowledge of the three main technologies that make up modern Web Components.

questions.question: Which set of APIs allows you to define new, custom HTML tags (e.g., <user-profile>)?
What is the primary role of the 'Shadow DOM' in Web Components?
options: To make the component load faster.
To provide a set of JavaScript APIs for attaching an encapsulated DOM tree to an element, preventing styles from leaking out.
To automatically generate CSS animations for the component.
To track a user's behavior within a specific component.

questions.question: Which JavaScript method is used to register a new custom element with the browser?
Web Components are native to the browser and do NOT require an external framework like React or Vue to function.
When using the Shadow DOM, if you set the mode to 'open', what does it mean?
options: The component is visible to the user.
The shadow root is accessible to JavaScript outside the component.
The component's code is available on the public web.
The component can be used in any browser.
